title: WARNING
text: WARNING Operation called by the SAX parser when it issues a warning. Explain this code operation WARNING params string List: in endparams Implement your code here end; WARNING operation Copy Parameters List Associated list identifying the location and nature of the error. The identifiers can be: LINE —line number within the XML document where the error occurred COLUMN —column number within the XML document where the error occurred MESSAGE —error message issued by the parser. If provided by the SAX parser, the following may also be in the list: PUBLICID —public identifier of an XML entity SYSTEMID —local identifier of an XML entity Return Values If the operation returns a non-negative value, parsing continues. Description Use getitem /id to retrieve individual items from this list. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
